citation.sourceCondition: OC Condition 1 ("Long-Dated Collateral Obligation" definition, p. 135) + Aggregate Principal Balance definition paragraph (e), p. 142 ("deemed to be zero" rule)

warnings.message: Interpreted wacSpread 3.6799999999999997 as percentage → 368 bps
7/7 pool composition pct fields null in upstream extraction; resolver re-derived from concentrations. Verify ingest is reading the concentration table correctly.

Trustee/admin fee found in PPM but rate is 'per agreement' (or otherwise unparseable) — `trusteeFeeBps` stayed at the CLO_DEFAULTS zero, so engine would accrue no trustee fee per period. Refusing to run rather than ship a projection that silently under-states senior expenses by the full trustee accrual. Set the rate manually from the compliance report fee schedule (typically 1-5 bps).

12 active position(s) have no Moody's rating in any SDF or Intex channel: Iu Finance Management GMBH, Awaze Limited, Apollo Finco, Mistral Holdco SAS, Sunrise Bidco Sarl, Sgb-Smit Midco GMBH, Guadarrama Proyectos Educativos SL, Cordobes Holdco Sl (+4 more). These positions silently fall into the bucket-rating fallback for the per-agency Caa Obligations test, understating the trustee-reported concentration. Ingest the Intex DealCF positions CSV (Structured Data Files upload) so per-position shadow ratings populate.

26 active position(s) have no Fitch rating in any SDF or Intex channel: Mcafee Corp, Fugue Finance LLC, Rubix Group Finco Limited, Castle US Holding Corporation, Chemours Company (The), Home VI, Iu Finance Management GMBH, Awaze Limited (+18 more). These positions silently fall into the bucket-rating fallback for the per-agency Fitch CCC Obligations test, understating the trustee-reported concentration. Ingest the Intex DealCF positions CSV (Structured Data Files upload) so per-position shadow ratings populate.

PPM § 10(a)(i) interest-non-payment grace period not extracted; engine defaults to 0 (any senior-interest shortfall fires Event of Default immediately). This is the conservative PPM-correct default for the modal quarterly-payment CLO (sub-period cure windows lapse before the next checkpoint). A deal whose PPM grants a multi-period grace would over-trigger acceleration under stress; verify PPM § 10(a)(i) before relying on stress-scenario IRRs.

413 raw holdings collapse to 236 unique (obligor, facilityCode) pairs — 177 rows are purchase-lot fragments. Of those, 36 row(s) in 16 cluster(s) are identical on (obligor, facilityCode, parBalance). Pool totals include all rows; per-facility consumers should aggregate by (obligorName, facilityCode) and sum par.

3 test(s) have an actual value but no trigger and are not marked passing — consumers filtering on triggerLevel != null will hide them. Examples: Minimum WAS excl floor incl Agg Exc Funded Spread; Minimum WAS excl floor excl Agg Exc Funded Spread; Frequency Switch part (b)

fees.name: Senior Collateral Management Fee
fees.basis: % per annum of Collateral Principal Amount
fees.description: Interest (E); Senior to junior mgmt fee; Excl. VAT

fees.name: Subordinated Collateral Management Fee
fees.basis: % per annum of Collateral Principal Amount

fees.name: Incentive Collateral Management Fee
fees.basis: 20% of residual Interest/Principal Proceeds otherwise distributable to Sub Notes
fees.description: Incentive Fee IRR Threshold; Excl. VAT

fees.name: Administrative Expenses
fees.basis: Subject to Senior Expenses Cap; includes Collateral Administrator, Custodian, Calculation Agent, Securitisation Transparency Reporting

waterfall.interestPriority:
(A) Issuer taxes (i) + Issuer Profit Amount (ii)
(B) Trustee Fees & Expenses — subject to Senior Expenses Cap
(C) Administrative Expenses — subject to Senior Expenses Cap
(D) Top-up of Expense Reserve Account — Senior Expenses Cap headroom
(E) Senior Collateral Management Fee + VAT (current, then past due)
(F) Scheduled Periodic Hedge Payments + Currency/Interest Rate Hedge Termination Payments (non-defaulted); Hedge Replacement Payments
(G) Class A Interest Amounts
(H) Class B-1 & B-2 Interest Amounts (pro rata, pari passu)
(I) Redemption to cure Class A/B Coverage Tests (per Note Payment Sequence)
(J) Class C Interest Amounts (current, ex Deferred Interest)
(K) Class C Deferred Interest (per Condition 6(c))
(L) Redemption to cure Class C Coverage Tests
(M) Class D Interest Amounts (current, ex Deferred Interest)
(N) Class D Deferred Interest
(O) Redemption to cure Class D Coverage Tests
(P) Class E Interest Amounts (current, ex Deferred Interest)
(Q) Class E Deferred Interest
(R) Redemption to cure Class E Par Value Test
(S) Class F Interest Amounts (current, ex Deferred Interest)
(T) Class F Deferred Interest
(U) Redemption to cure Class F Par Value Test
(V) Redemption on Effective Date Rating Event (if continuing)
(W) Reinvestment OC Test cure: lesser of 50% of remaining IP, or amount to meet 103.74%, at CM discretion — reinvest or repay Rated Notes
(X) Sub Collateral Management Fee + VAT (current, then past due); then CM Advances + interest thereon
(Y) Trustee Fees & Expenses not paid under cap
(Z) Administrative Expenses not paid under cap
(AA) Defaulted Currency/IR Hedge Termination Payments (pari passu, pro rata)
(BB) Supplemental Reserve Account deposit (during Reinvestment Period, CM discretion)
(CC) Incentive Collateral Management Fee (IF IRR Threshold met: 20% of remaining IP) + VAT
(DD) All remaining Interest Proceeds → Subordinated Notes (pro rata)
waterfall.postAcceleration: (A) taxes + profit → (B) trustee fees uncapped → (C) admin expenses uncapped → (D) senior mgmt fee → (E) hedge periodic/termination (non-defaulted) → (F) Class A P+I → (G) Class B P+I pari passu → (H) Class C I+P sequential → … → (Q) Sub mgmt fee → (T) hedge defaulted termination → (V) incentive fee if IRR met → (W) residual to Sub Noteholders
waterfall.principalPriority:
(A) Sequential backfill of unpaid Interest waterfall items (A)–(H)
(B) Backfill of Interest item (I) to extent needed for Class A/B Coverage Tests
(C) Backfill of Interest item (J) to extent Class C Notes are Controlling Class
(D) Backfill of Interest item (K) to extent Class C Notes are Controlling Class
(E) Backfill of Interest item (L) to extent needed for Class C Coverage Tests
(F) Backfill of Interest item (M) to extent Class D Notes are Controlling Class
(G) Backfill of Interest item (N) to extent Class D Notes are Controlling Class
(H) Backfill of Interest item (O) to extent needed for Class D Coverage Tests
(I) Backfill of Interest item (P) to extent Class E Notes are Controlling Class
(J) Backfill of Interest item (Q) to extent Class E Notes are Controlling Class
(K) Backfill of Interest item (R) to extent needed for Class E Par Value Test
(L) Backfill of Interest item (S) to extent Class F Notes are Controlling Class
(M) Backfill of Interest item (T) to extent Class F Notes are Controlling Class
(N) Backfill of Interest item (U) to extent needed for Class F Par Value Test
(O) Backfill of Interest item (V) — Effective Date Rating Event
(P) Special Redemption Amount (CM election on Special Redemption Date)
(Q) Reinvestment/Substitute Collateral — (1) during Reinvestment Period: purchase Substitute Collateral or hold in Principal Account at CM discretion; (2) post-Reinvestment: reinvestment of Unscheduled Proceeds + Credit Improved/Credit Risk sale proceeds at CM discretion
(R) After Reinvestment Period: redeem Notes per Note Payment Sequence
(S) After Reinvestment Period: sequential backfill of Interest items (W)–(Z)
(T) Reinvesting Noteholder Reinvestment Amounts (sub notes)
(U) Incentive Collateral Management Fee (IF IRR Threshold met) + VAT
(V) All remaining Principal Proceeds → Subordinated Notes (principal first, then interest, pro rata)

dealIdentity.dealName: Ares European CLO XV Designated Activity Company
dealIdentity.entityType: Designated activity company limited by shares
dealIdentity.issuerLegalName: Ares European CLO XV Designated Activity Company
dealIdentity.listingExchange: Irish Stock Exchange (Global Exchange Market) — Rated Notes only

conventions.euribor_cessation_fallback: Condition 6(e)(i)(B)–(C): Reference Banks polled; alternative benchmarks invoked if primary screen rate unavailable
conventions.reference_rate_determination: Interest Determination Date (2 Business Days before Accrual Period start) at 11:00 a.m. Brussels
conventions.reference_rate_initial_period: Linear interpolation of 6-month and 12-month EURIBOR (Issue Date to 15-Jul-2022 only)

class_a.note: Non-payment beyond 5 BDs (7 BDs if error/omission) is a Note Event of Default per Condition 6 & 10(a)(i)

class_b.note: Non-payment beyond 5 BDs (7 BDs if error/omission) is a Note Event of Default

class_c.mechanics: Accrues as Deferred Interest; added to Principal Amount Outstanding; thereafter accrues interest at applicable Class rate

class_d.mechanics: Same as Class C per Condition 6(c)

class_e.mechanics: Same as Class C per Condition 6(c)

class_f.mechanics: Same as Class C per Condition 6(c)

subordinated_notes.mechanics: No stated coupon; residual distribution only via Interest waterfall (DD), Principal waterfall (V), Post-Accel waterfall (W); non-payment due to insufficient IP/PP is not a Note Event of Default

frequency_switch_event.trigger_logic: Either (a) CM discretion OR both (b) and (c) below (while any Class A Notes outstanding)
frequency_switch_event.measurement_dates: Each Determination Date from (and including) the Determination Date immediately preceding the second Payment Date
effects_on_trigger: Payment Dates switch from quarterly to semi-annual keyed to the prior Payment Date month (15-Jan/15-Jul if last quarterly was Jan/Jul; 15-Apr/15-Oct if last quarterly was Apr/Oct)
Reference rate for all FRN tranches moves from 3-month to 6-month EURIBOR
Issuer Profit Amount steps from €250 to €500 per period
frequency_switch_event.status_as_of_2026_04_01: No Frequency Switch Event has occurred. Deal continues on quarterly payments and 3-month EURIBOR.
frequency_switch_event.trigger_a_cm_discretion: The Collateral Manager declares in its sole discretion that a Frequency Switch Event has occurred

trigger_b_concentration_test.metric: Aggregate Principal Balance of all Frequency Switch Obligations (excluding Defaulted Obligations) ÷ Collateral Principal Amount (excluding Defaulted Obligations)

trigger_c_interest_shortfall_test.numerator: (A) scheduled and projected interest on Collateral Obligations during the next Due Period + (B) Interest Smoothing Account balance
trigger_c_interest_shortfall_test.denominator: Scheduled payments for Interest Priority of Payments paragraphs (A)–(I) on the second Payment Date following the Measurement Date

worked_example_class_a_15apr2026.tie_out: Matches 15-Apr-2026 Payment Date Report figure exactly

reinvestmentOcTest.diversionAmount: Interest diversion (lesser of 50% of residual IP or cure amount) during Reinvestment Period

longDatedObligation.sourceCondition: OC Condition 1 ("Long-Dated Collateral Obligation" definition, p. 135) + Aggregate Principal Balance definition paragraph (e), p. 142 ("deemed to be zero" rule)

collateralQualityTests.name: Fitch Maximum WARF Test
collateralQualityTests.value: Applicable only while Fitch-rated Notes outstanding; elected case from Fitch Test Matrix

collateralQualityTests.name: Fitch Minimum WA Recovery Rate Test
collateralQualityTests.value: Applicable only while Fitch-rated Notes outstanding; recovery rate per Fitch methodology

collateralQualityTests.name: Moody's Maximum WARF Test
collateralQualityTests.value: Elected case from Moody's Test Matrix (row = Min WAS, column = Min Diversity Score)

collateralQualityTests.name: Moody's Minimum WA Recovery Rate Test
collateralQualityTests.value: 43.5% minus WARF Adjustment; WARF Adjustment scales with WAS bucket

collateralQualityTests.name: Moody's Minimum Diversity Test
collateralQualityTests.value: Elected case from Matrix — Min Diversity score parameter (28 to 72 in steps of 2)

collateralQualityTests.name: Minimum Weighted Average Spread Test
collateralQualityTests.value: Elected case from Matrix row (2.20% to 5.80%); Floating WAS plus Excess WAC

collateralQualityTests.name: Weighted Average Life Test
collateralQualityTests.value: WAL not exceeding specified year target; key forward-looking test as Reinvestment ends

numerator_components.description: Aggregate Principal Balance of all Collateral Obligations other than Defaulted Obligations
For each Defaulted Obligation: Market Value × Principal Balance (MV × PB)
Principal Proceeds standing to the credit of the Principal Account on the Measurement Date

eventOfDefaultParValueTest.behaviour_with_defaults: MV component activates — defaulted par is effectively replaced by recovery-adjusted market value
eventOfDefaultParValueTest.denominator_description: Principal Amount Outstanding of the Class A Notes only
eventOfDefaultParValueTest.downstream_modelling_note: Single testType=OC_PAR will mis-compute the ratio in any default scenario; must represent components (1), (2), (3) compositionally
eventOfDefaultParValueTest.behaviour_when_defaults_zero: Component (2) = 0; numerator collapses to APB(non-defaulted) + Principal Proceeds = Adjusted CPA; test behaves identically to a Class-A-denominator OC_PAR

fundProfile.portfolioDescription: Senior Expenses (Trustee Fees, Administrative Expenses up to Senior Expenses Cap) -> Collateral Manager Senior Management Fee -> Hedge Payments -> Class X and Class A Notes (pari passu) -> Class B Notes -> Class A/B Coverage Test remediation -> Class C Notes -> Class C Coverage Test remediation -> Deferred Interest on Class C -> Class D Notes -> Class D Coverage Test remediation -> Deferred Interest on Class D -> Class E Notes -> Class E Par Value Test remediation -> Deferred Interest on Class E -> Class F Notes -> Class F Par Value Test remediation -> Deferred Interest on Class F -> Reinvestment Overcollateralisation Test diversion (50% if failed) -> Subordinated Management Fee -> Trustee Fees/Administrative Expenses above cap -> Defaulted Hedge Termination Payments -> Supplemental Reserve Amount -> Incentive Collateral Management Fee (20%) -> Subordinated Notes

deal.dealName: Ares European CLO XV Designated Activity Company
deal.issuerLegalEntity: Ares European CLO XV Designated Activity Company

fees.name: Senior Collateral Management Fee
fees.basis: % per annum of Collateral Principal Amount
fees.description: Interest (E); Senior to junior mgmt fee; Excl. VAT

fees.name: Subordinated Collateral Management Fee
fees.basis: % per annum of Collateral Principal Amount

fees.name: Incentive Collateral Management Fee
fees.basis: 20% of residual Interest/Principal Proceeds otherwise distributable to Sub Notes
fees.description: Incentive Fee IRR Threshold; Excl. VAT

fees.name: Administrative Expenses
fees.basis: Subject to Senior Expenses Cap; includes Collateral Administrator, Custodian, Calculation Agent, Securitisation Transparency Reporting

waterfall.interestPriority:
(A) Issuer taxes (i) + Issuer Profit Amount (ii)
(B) Trustee Fees & Expenses — subject to Senior Expenses Cap
(C) Administrative Expenses — subject to Senior Expenses Cap
(D) Top-up of Expense Reserve Account — Senior Expenses Cap headroom
(E) Senior Collateral Management Fee + VAT (current, then past due)
(F) Scheduled Periodic Hedge Payments + Currency/Interest Rate Hedge Termination Payments (non-defaulted); Hedge Replacement Payments
(G) Class A Interest Amounts
(H) Class B-1 & B-2 Interest Amounts (pro rata, pari passu)
(I) Redemption to cure Class A/B Coverage Tests (per Note Payment Sequence)
(J) Class C Interest Amounts (current, ex Deferred Interest)
(K) Class C Deferred Interest (per Condition 6(c))
(L) Redemption to cure Class C Coverage Tests
(M) Class D Interest Amounts (current, ex Deferred Interest)
(N) Class D Deferred Interest
(O) Redemption to cure Class D Coverage Tests
(P) Class E Interest Amounts (current, ex Deferred Interest)
(Q) Class E Deferred Interest
(R) Redemption to cure Class E Par Value Test
(S) Class F Interest Amounts (current, ex Deferred Interest)
(T) Class F Deferred Interest
(U) Redemption to cure Class F Par Value Test
(V) Redemption on Effective Date Rating Event (if continuing)
(W) Reinvestment OC Test cure: lesser of 50% of remaining IP, or amount to meet 103.74%, at CM discretion — reinvest or repay Rated Notes
(X) Sub Collateral Management Fee + VAT (current, then past due); then CM Advances + interest thereon
(Y) Trustee Fees & Expenses not paid under cap
(Z) Administrative Expenses not paid under cap
(AA) Defaulted Currency/IR Hedge Termination Payments (pari passu, pro rata)
(BB) Supplemental Reserve Account deposit (during Reinvestment Period, CM discretion)
(CC) Incentive Collateral Management Fee (IF IRR Threshold met: 20% of remaining IP) + VAT
(DD) All remaining Interest Proceeds → Subordinated Notes (pro rata)
waterfall.postAcceleration: (A) taxes + profit → (B) trustee fees uncapped → (C) admin expenses uncapped → (D) senior mgmt fee → (E) hedge periodic/termination (non-defaulted) → (F) Class A P+I → (G) Class B P+I pari passu → (H) Class C I+P sequential → … → (Q) Sub mgmt fee → (T) hedge defaulted termination → (V) incentive fee if IRR met → (W) residual to Sub Noteholders
waterfall.principalPriority:
(A) Sequential backfill of unpaid Interest waterfall items (A)–(H)
(B) Backfill of Interest item (I) to extent needed for Class A/B Coverage Tests
(C) Backfill of Interest item (J) to extent Class C Notes are Controlling Class
(D) Backfill of Interest item (K) to extent Class C Notes are Controlling Class
(E) Backfill of Interest item (L) to extent needed for Class C Coverage Tests
(F) Backfill of Interest item (M) to extent Class D Notes are Controlling Class
(G) Backfill of Interest item (N) to extent Class D Notes are Controlling Class
(H) Backfill of Interest item (O) to extent needed for Class D Coverage Tests
(I) Backfill of Interest item (P) to extent Class E Notes are Controlling Class
(J) Backfill of Interest item (Q) to extent Class E Notes are Controlling Class
(K) Backfill of Interest item (R) to extent needed for Class E Par Value Test
(L) Backfill of Interest item (S) to extent Class F Notes are Controlling Class
(M) Backfill of Interest item (T) to extent Class F Notes are Controlling Class
(N) Backfill of Interest item (U) to extent needed for Class F Par Value Test
(O) Backfill of Interest item (V) — Effective Date Rating Event
(P) Special Redemption Amount (CM election on Special Redemption Date)
(Q) Reinvestment/Substitute Collateral — (1) during Reinvestment Period: purchase Substitute Collateral or hold in Principal Account at CM discretion; (2) post-Reinvestment: reinvestment of Unscheduled Proceeds + Credit Improved/Credit Risk sale proceeds at CM discretion
(R) After Reinvestment Period: redeem Notes per Note Payment Sequence
(S) After Reinvestment Period: sequential backfill of Interest items (W)–(Z)
(T) Reinvesting Noteholder Reinvestment Amounts (sub notes)
(U) Incentive Collateral Management Fee (IF IRR Threshold met) + VAT
(V) All remaining Principal Proceeds → Subordinated Notes (principal first, then interest, pro rata)

dealIdentity.dealName: Ares European CLO XV Designated Activity Company
dealIdentity.entityType: Designated activity company limited by shares
dealIdentity.issuerLegalName: Ares European CLO XV Designated Activity Company
dealIdentity.listingExchange: Irish Stock Exchange (Global Exchange Market) — Rated Notes only

conventions.euribor_cessation_fallback: Condition 6(e)(i)(B)–(C): Reference Banks polled; alternative benchmarks invoked if primary screen rate unavailable
conventions.reference_rate_determination: Interest Determination Date (2 Business Days before Accrual Period start) at 11:00 a.m. Brussels
conventions.reference_rate_initial_period: Linear interpolation of 6-month and 12-month EURIBOR (Issue Date to 15-Jul-2022 only)

class_a.note: Non-payment beyond 5 BDs (7 BDs if error/omission) is a Note Event of Default per Condition 6 & 10(a)(i)

class_b.note: Non-payment beyond 5 BDs (7 BDs if error/omission) is a Note Event of Default

class_c.mechanics: Accrues as Deferred Interest; added to Principal Amount Outstanding; thereafter accrues interest at applicable Class rate

class_d.mechanics: Same as Class C per Condition 6(c)

class_e.mechanics: Same as Class C per Condition 6(c)

class_f.mechanics: Same as Class C per Condition 6(c)

subordinated_notes.mechanics: No stated coupon; residual distribution only via Interest waterfall (DD), Principal waterfall (V), Post-Accel waterfall (W); non-payment due to insufficient IP/PP is not a Note Event of Default

frequency_switch_event.trigger_logic: Either (a) CM discretion OR both (b) and (c) below (while any Class A Notes outstanding)
frequency_switch_event.measurement_dates: Each Determination Date from (and including) the Determination Date immediately preceding the second Payment Date
effects_on_trigger: Payment Dates switch from quarterly to semi-annual keyed to the prior Payment Date month (15-Jan/15-Jul if last quarterly was Jan/Jul; 15-Apr/15-Oct if last quarterly was Apr/Oct)
Reference rate for all FRN tranches moves from 3-month to 6-month EURIBOR
Issuer Profit Amount steps from €250 to €500 per period
frequency_switch_event.status_as_of_2026_04_01: No Frequency Switch Event has occurred. Deal continues on quarterly payments and 3-month EURIBOR.
frequency_switch_event.trigger_a_cm_discretion: The Collateral Manager declares in its sole discretion that a Frequency Switch Event has occurred

trigger_b_concentration_test.metric: Aggregate Principal Balance of all Frequency Switch Obligations (excluding Defaulted Obligations) ÷ Collateral Principal Amount (excluding Defaulted Obligations)

trigger_c_interest_shortfall_test.numerator: (A) scheduled and projected interest on Collateral Obligations during the next Due Period + (B) Interest Smoothing Account balance
trigger_c_interest_shortfall_test.denominator: Scheduled payments for Interest Priority of Payments paragraphs (A)–(I) on the second Payment Date following the Measurement Date

worked_example_class_a_15apr2026.tie_out: Matches 15-Apr-2026 Payment Date Report figure exactly

reinvestmentOcTest.diversionAmount: Interest diversion (lesser of 50% of residual IP or cure amount) during Reinvestment Period

longDatedObligation.sourceCondition: OC Condition 1 ("Long-Dated Collateral Obligation" definition, p. 135) + Aggregate Principal Balance definition paragraph (e), p. 142 ("deemed to be zero" rule)

collateralQualityTests.name: Fitch Maximum WARF Test
collateralQualityTests.value: Applicable only while Fitch-rated Notes outstanding; elected case from Fitch Test Matrix

collateralQualityTests.name: Fitch Minimum WA Recovery Rate Test
collateralQualityTests.value: Applicable only while Fitch-rated Notes outstanding; recovery rate per Fitch methodology

collateralQualityTests.name: Moody's Maximum WARF Test
collateralQualityTests.value: Elected case from Moody's Test Matrix (row = Min WAS, column = Min Diversity Score)

collateralQualityTests.name: Moody's Minimum WA Recovery Rate Test
collateralQualityTests.value: 43.5% minus WARF Adjustment; WARF Adjustment scales with WAS bucket

collateralQualityTests.name: Moody's Minimum Diversity Test
collateralQualityTests.value: Elected case from Matrix — Min Diversity score parameter (28 to 72 in steps of 2)

collateralQualityTests.name: Minimum Weighted Average Spread Test
collateralQualityTests.value: Elected case from Matrix row (2.20% to 5.80%); Floating WAS plus Excess WAC

collateralQualityTests.name: Weighted Average Life Test
collateralQualityTests.value: WAL not exceeding specified year target; key forward-looking test as Reinvestment ends

numerator_components.description: Aggregate Principal Balance of all Collateral Obligations other than Defaulted Obligations
For each Defaulted Obligation: Market Value × Principal Balance (MV × PB)
Principal Proceeds standing to the credit of the Principal Account on the Measurement Date

eventOfDefaultParValueTest.behaviour_with_defaults: MV component activates — defaulted par is effectively replaced by recovery-adjusted market value
eventOfDefaultParValueTest.denominator_description: Principal Amount Outstanding of the Class A Notes only
eventOfDefaultParValueTest.downstream_modelling_note: Single testType=OC_PAR will mis-compute the ratio in any default scenario; must represent components (1), (2), (3) compositionally
eventOfDefaultParValueTest.behaviour_when_defaults_zero: Component (2) = 0; numerator collapses to APB(non-defaulted) + Principal Proceeds = Adjusted CPA; test behaves identically to a Class-A-denominator OC_PAR
